title: [FIRRTL] plusarg intrinsics should lower to a register.

features.name: plusargs with boolean success flag in initial block
features.description: Code should include $value$plusargs called in an initial block with a boolean success flag variable assigned the return value

features.name: packed struct with multiple fields for plusargs grouping
features.description: Code should include a packed struct type used to group multiple values loaded from $value$plusargs in an initial block

features.name: dual register pattern for plusargs result
features.description: Code should include both a boolean success flag and a value register, where the flag indicates if the plusargs pattern matched and the register holds the parsed value
